## Summary

- Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass locally (or rationale provided if not applicable)
- [ ] Manual verification completed for changed behavior

## Dependency Safety Checklist

- [ ] No new dependencies were added
- [ ] If new dependency was added, explicit user approval was obtained before adding/installing
- [ ] Existing project dependencies were evaluated first (`pyproject.toml` / `requirements.txt`)
- [ ] New dependency version is pinned
- [ ] Package legitimacy reviewed (official source, maintenance, adoption)
- [ ] Vulnerability scan run after dependency change (for example, `pip-audit`)
- [ ] Any dependency risk or exception is documented in this PR

## Notes

- Follow the project dependency policy: `DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md`
